logger.doc:name: Log Before Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Salesforce Accounts Sapi Start: " ++ now()]

logger.doc:name: Log After Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Salesforce Accounts Sapi End: " ++ now()]

logger.doc:name: Log Before Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Local Market Sapi Start: " ++ now()]

logger.doc:name: Log After Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Local Market Sapi End: " ++ now() ++ (if(p('log.payloadFlag') == 'true') ("\'Payload\': " ++ write(payload,"application/json")) else "")]

logger.doc:name: Log Before Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Miles Sapi Start: " ++ now()]

logger.doc:name: Log After Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Miles Sapi End: " ++ now()]

logger.doc:name: Log Before Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Salesforce Common Sapi Start: " ++ now()]

logger.doc:name: Log After Request
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'Application Form ID\': " ++ vars.applicationFormId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Salesforce Common Sapi End: " ++ now()]
